summary: feat: add GUI bind mode with zenity prompt via --prompt flag

decisions.title: Re-exec detach instead of libc::fork
decisions.rationale: Zero unsafe code, zero new dependencies. Child is a fresh exec so no post-fork Rust state hazards. Uses nightly process_setsid feature.
tradeoffs: Bind results not visible in pssh output, only in logs + zenity feedback

rejected_alternatives.reason: Requires unsafe blocks, post-fork Rust state issues
Still unsafe under the hood, adds dependency

side_effects: New hidden --_bg CLI flag for internal use

decisions.title: Cross-user GUI via runuser + loginctl session detection
decisions.rationale: setuid root binary must not directly connect to stu's X11/Wayland. runuser -u stu ensures zenity runs with correct user credentials and session access.
tradeoffs: Depends on loginctl, runuser, zenity being available on target
assumptions: player_user has active local graphical session

rejected_alternatives.reason: Security risk: exposes X11 to all local users
Cookie leakage grants full display access

side_effects: SAFE_PATH includes sbin for runuser resolution

summary: chore(assets): tighten firefox contest browser policy

decisions.title: Apply stricter Firefox enterprise defaults
decisions.rationale: Keep contest browsers focused on the contest site and suppress first-run and account-related flows.
tradeoffs: Reduces browser flexibility for operators during setup
assumptions: Client machines honor Firefox enterprise policies
side_effects: Disables telemetry, studies, and default-browser prompts

summary: chore(assets): tighten firefox contest browser policy

decisions.title: Apply stricter Firefox enterprise defaults

summary: fix(client): remove lightdm seat header on cleanup

decisions.title: Strip LightDM seat section during cleanup
decisions.rationale: Avoid leaving duplicate [Seat:*] sections behind when autologin is toggled multiple times.
tradeoffs: Removes the generic seat header even if other options were manually placed under it
assumptions: The managed client config owns this autologin section
side_effects: Cleanup now removes both the autologin keys and the seat header

bugs.symptom: Repeated autologin toggles could accumulate duplicate [Seat:*] entries in lightdm.conf.
bugs.root_cause: Cleanup removed autologin keys but left the section header behind.
bugs.fix: Remove the [Seat:*] line alongside LightDM autologin settings.
